---
title: "Grok — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Descriptive catalog of canonical parser v3 parquets"
source-title: "Grok"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, DuckDB connection, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

SOURCE_KEY     = "grok"
SOURCE_TITLE   = "Grok"
SOURCE_COLOR   = "#1DA1F2"  # X / xAI blue
MUTED          = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED      = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Grok"
TABLES         = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events"]
AUX_TABLES     = ["project_metadata", "conversation_projects", "assets", "scheduled_tasks"]
ACCOUNT_FILTER = None

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **About Grok:** parser v3 covering Grok web app (xAI). Sender `human`/
> `assistant` mapped to canonical roles, models grok-3 / grok-4 / grok-4-auto,
> ToolEvent emitted for webSearchResults / xposts / ragResults / connectorSearch
> / generatedImageUrls / toolResponses. Projects (workspaces) with
> `customPersonality` (instructions) + cross-ref to conversations via
> `conversation_projects`. Imagine (image generation) is paywall-only and
> not captured. Branches not detected in V1 — `response_node.threads` may
> expose alternative paths in future.

{{< include _template.qmd >}}

{{< include _template_aux.qmd >}}
